curation_notes.Bayne Cobb: Often appears in prose as the pair "Bayne and Frances" with Frances Cobb, his wife.
curation_notes.Frances Cobb: Often appears paired as "Bayne and Frances" with Bayne Cobb (*his wife).
curation_notes.Blue and Ruby Cole: Shorter phrases "Blue and Ruby" and "Blue Cole" refer to the same neighbors, Blue and Ruby Cole.
curation_notes.Charles T. Brumfield: Also referred to as "Charlie Brumfield" in some stories.
curation_notes.Dot Cobb: Dot Hill is her maiden name—the same person. "Keith and Dot" in the memoir refers to her with Keith Cobb.
curation_notes.Dr Carter Dobbs: Sometimes shortened to "Dr Carter" in the text.
curation_notes.Frances Mallory: "Miss Frances" and "Miss Frances Mallory" refer to this same teacher.
curation_notes.Jim Madonna: "Madonna and Jim" (and similar transcript variants with Jon/Jim) refer to Jim Madonna.
curation_notes.Keith Cobb: "Keith and Dot" refers to Keith with Dot Cobb (née Hill).
